## Description

Brief description of the change. Link to any related issues.

## Checklist (required for merge)

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] The name "MrSilhouette" remains the immutable author (no changes to LICENSE, pyproject, README authorship, or commit trailers)
- [ ] All commits are GPG-signed and include `Signed-off-by: MrSilhouette <mr.silhouette@users.noreply.github.com>`
- [ ] I have tested the change with a clean source install (`pip install .` or `pip install git+...` in a fresh venv)
- [ ] New functionality includes or updates tests / smoke verification where appropriate
- [ ] Documentation (README, docs/, docstrings) is updated if user-facing
- [ ] Changes are additive / backward-compatible for the public API surface

## Live Core Parity

If this change improves parity between the public package and the internal live orchestrator_mcp (e.g. more Synaptogenesis wiring, closed-loop shims, etc.), please note the specific capabilities now better matched.

## Testing

Describe how you verified the change (commands run, venvs used, etc.).

## Screenshots / Examples (if UI or output changes)

## Additional Notes

Anything else the maintainers should know.
